content: For SaaS MVPs the default 2025 pattern is Next.js (App Router, v15+) with Route Handlers serving as the backend, including streaming LLM responses (SSE) — Vercel AI SDK integrates first-class. A separate Fastify/NestJS backend is warranted only for multiple non-web clients, heavy middleware, or microservices. Since a Chrome extension is a second client, Next.js Route Handlers can still serve it as a plain HTTP API; hybrid split can come later.
